samples.xml_description:
<module id="div_16bit">
    <description>Implement a 16-bit divider module with 16-bit dividend and 8-bit divisor in combinational logic.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="A" width_description="[15:0]">16-bit dividend input.</input>
        <input id="B" width_description="[7:0]">8-bit divisor input.</input>
        <output id="result" width_description="[15:0]">16-bit quotient output.</output>
        <output id="odd" width_description="[15:0]">16-bit remainder output.</output>
    </ports>
    <implementation>
        Always block triggered by changes in inputs A and B.
        Updates a_reg and b_reg with the values of A and B, respectively.
        
        Always block triggered by changes in inputs A and B.
        Compares the extracted bits of a_reg with b_reg.
        Sets the corresponding bit of result to 1 if a_reg is greater than or equal to b_reg,
        otherwise sets it to 0.
        Uses the difference as the new value of a_reg for the next iteration.
        Concatenates the remainder with the highest remaining 1-bit of a_reg.
        Repeats the process until all dividend bits are processed.
    </implementation>
</module>
